batch: Batch120 — Raw Build Diagnostic Lifecycle Hardening
purpose: Prevent raw-build evidence from being overclaimed when the diagnostic process is interrupted, externally killed, or leaves a running/stale artifact while Next artifacts may still exist.
scope: P0 Runtime/Build Closure only; no feature expansion.
controls: raw-next-build-diagnostic writes running=false only on finalized exit paths
external SIGINT/SIGTERM writes an interrupted artifact before exiting
diagnostic uses a non-detached child process to avoid orphaned Next builds under CI/tool timeouts
hard gate blocks raw closure when raw diagnostic artifact is still running or interrupted
hosted closure still requires strict GIAOAN_DEMO_URL smoke and is not implied by local build
